Author: Verified User
Title: Kudos to James at Bond!
Text: Texting at 3:00 AM with a professional security agent provided me and my family with needed assurance! It instantly made us feel safer and capable of increasing our level of protection if we needed it. Thankfully things were resolved, and our worst case scenario didn't materialize, but I'm going to insist that all my family members have Bond on their phone from now on!

Author: Verified User
Title: Saved my life.. LITERALLY!
Text: If I wouldn't have had Bond on my side, I would be 6 feet under right now. Unable to call 911, countless times at the hands of my viscous, abusive, and psychotic ex-husband; Bond was my saving grace. He would stop abusing me when Bond was watching and the videos are proof of what he did to me for over a year and a half. I would recommend Bond to anyone without a voice, or a way to cry for help. Thank you Bond. I owe you my life!!!!! 🙏😭💕❤️

Title: Excellent
